facebook.caption:
POV: you book a foot massage on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and walk out two hours later feeling like a different person.

LUNA SPA on Phú Quốc's main strip. 4.9 stars across 167 reviews. Body massage, foot massage, shampoo, Gội Đầu Dưỡng Sinh. Full menu, one address.

Not a resort spa. No inflated prices. Just solid work that keeps people coming back.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
